  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Luminaires staged for installation lack independent support wires or hardware required to secure them independently of the ceiling grid."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Procure and install independent support wires (minimum 12 AWG) secured to the building structure above, in accordance with NEC 410.36(B) and local building codes, before hanging the fixtures."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 410.36(B), luminaires supported by a suspended ceiling frame must be securely fastened to the ceiling framing member, and the framing members themselves must be securely fastened to the building structure. Most building codes and inspectors require independent support wires (typically two per fixture on opposite corners) connected directly to the structural deck above to prevent the fixture from falling if the ceiling grid fails.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.36(B)"
  ]
}
